div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 197px; height: 1px; padding-top: 96px; margin-left: 465px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 189px; height: 1px; padding-top: 116px; margin-left: 470px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; max-height: 368px; overflow: hidden; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
+ getTrade(): int
+ postTrade(): int
+ putTrade(): int

- notifySender(): int
